---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Something's broken and it's not your fault (probably)
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?

<!-- A clear description of the bug. "It broke" is not enough. "It broke when I tried to run `rm -rf /` ...just kidding, or am I?" is better. -->

## What did you expect to happen?

<!-- What should have happened instead? -->

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Run command '...'
4. See error

## Screenshots

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots. terminal screenshots are basically required for a terminal app. -->

## Environment

- **Distro:** (e.g. Arch Linux, Fedora 40, CachyOS)
- **Plasma version:** (`plasmashell --version`)
- **Qt version:** (`qmake6 --version` or `qtpaths6 --qt-version`)
- **Plasminal version:** (check metadata.json)

## Additional context

<!-- Any other info that might be relevant. What were you doing when the bug happened? Were you trying something unusual? Were the phases of the moon aligned? -->
